title: PSNY Polestar Automotive Financial Status Profitability
text: Polestar Automotive Holding UK NASDAQ PSNY shows company is currently unprofitable with net profit for twelve months ending December 31, 2025 of negative $2.36 billion. Key metrics include trailing 12-month earnings negative $2.4 billion, revenue $3.1 billion, profit margin negative 77.1%, EBITDA negative $1.92 billion and return on assets negative 59%. For fiscal year 2025, company experienced 15% improvement in earnings year-over-year though within negative territory. Industry comparison shows PSNY has largest losses among tracked automotive stocks, significantly worse than Lucid Motors and Lordstown Motors. Data indicates PSNY remains in substantial financial distress with large operating losses despite $3.1 billion revenue generation. Profitability challenge driven by nascent EV manufacturer ramping production volumes while facing pricing pressures, tariff impacts and capital expenditure requirements for retail network and manufacturing capacity establishment.
